chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2346 of 2024 CP D 2347 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10685/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Mr. Mushtaque Hussain Qazi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Umair Nabi, advocate for the respondent 14. Mr. M. Siddique, advocate holding brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondents 2 to 6. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, notices under section 26 of the Customs Act, 1969, has been impugned herein, however, such notices have not been issued to the petitioners. On such count, learned counsel for the petitioners has been unable to demonstrate the locus standi of the petitioners and/or be fall them as aggrieved persons within the requirements of Article 199 of the Constitution. Even otherwise, no grievance / cause of action is apparent there from. In view of foregoing, petitions are found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
